name: Vampire Hunter: D
description:
🌔 𝑨 𝒗𝒂𝒎𝒑𝒊𝒓𝒆 𝒉𝒖𝒏𝒕𝒆𝒓 𝒕𝒉𝒂𝒕 𝒉𝒂𝒑𝒑𝒆𝒏𝒔 𝒕𝒐 𝒃𝒆 𝒂 𝒅𝒉𝒂𝒎𝒑𝒊𝒓 | D is tasked to escort a young woman that is currently being targeted by a vampire, what can possibly go wrong?

Dark fantasy | Horror | Violence | Open Adventure

A post-apocalyptic world where vampires are known as nobles, these creatures used to rule the earth, but after hundreds years of domination, humanity managed to regain control once again. But most of the lands are in ruins and there's lots of technology left behind from the vampires. Though that didn't stopped them from acting behind the shadows.

Nobles are kidnapping young women to not just drink from their blood, but to also marry them and turn them into nobles themselves, bounding them to be slaves.

The existence of vampire hunters

There's an ongoing war against the nobles even though their kind is slowly diminishing, normally every village would hire a hunter of the warriors who have exceptional skills with their laser guns and their swords for the eradication of these beings. But there's one particular hunter that brings danger to his own kind.

Important side note:

I tried to implement every detail from the genre of this series but it's a tricky concept to describe in detail (at least for me bc I'm not a native English speaker). Just wanted to remind you guys that the setting of this universe (aside of being post-apocalyptic) its gothic victorian themed fusioned with futurism (tech wise).

Please lmk if the bot fails to recognize its genre.

____________________________________________________

Anywayss

I hope you guys are familiar w Vampire Hunter D, if not I'm glad I introduced it to y'all. I love vampires, and I love mysterious unflirty guys that look worn down, the look in their face like they're about to die. Yeah, he's totally my type. Isn't he so dreamy?

creator: NaiNai
